principal.title: Principal
principal.description: The identity — human, agent, or service — requesting authority.

mandate.title: Mandate
mandate.description: A short-lived signed JWT binding a principal to a policy and intent.

policy.title: Policy
policy.description: Declarative OPA Rego rules evaluated at the gate before any action runs.

delegation.title: Delegation
delegation.description: Transfer of scoped authority from one principal to another.

constraint.title: Delegation Constraint
constraint.description: A typed restriction (resources, TTL, hops, budget) attached to a delegation edge.

intent.title: Intent
intent.description: The declared structured action a principal is about to take.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: The boundary of policies, principals, and audit data Caracal manages.

ledger.title: Ledger
ledger.description: The append-only tamper-evident record of every authority decision.

zone.title: Zone
zone.description: A deployment unit owning ES256 signing keys and a zone encryption key for provider credentials.

resource-binding.title: Resource Binding
resource-binding.description: A mapping from a resource identifier to an upstream URL and routing directives.
